Why Choose Us

The difference is in the details

🎯
Precision Prep Work

We spend more time prepping than most spend painting. Proper surface prep is the foundation of a paint job that lasts years, not months.

🛡️
Licensed & Insured

Fully licensed and carrying comprehensive liability insurance and WSIB coverage. Your property and our team are always protected.

✅
On Time, Every Time

We respect your time. Projects are completed on schedule, job sites are left clean, and we communicate every step of the way.

🎨
Premium Materials

We use only premium paints from top brands — Benjamin Moore, Sherwin-Williams, PPG. Quality materials, properly applied, deliver results that last.

💬
Free Colour Consultation

Not sure what colour to choose? Our free consultation takes the guesswork out. We help you pick the perfect palette for your space.

📋
Transparent Quotes

No hidden fees, no surprises. We provide detailed, itemized quotes before any work begins. You always know exactly what you're paying for.

How It Works

Our Process

Simple, transparent, and stress-free from the first call to the final walk-through.

01 📞
Free Estimate

We come to your property, assess the work, and give you a clear itemized quote — no vague numbers, no surprises. Usually within 24–48 hours.

02 🎨
Prep & Protection

We protect your floors, furniture, and surfaces before a brush even comes out. Patching, sanding, priming, caulking — done properly before paint is ever applied.

03 🖌️
The Work

We show up when we say we will, work efficiently, and keep the job site clean throughout. Premium materials, precise application, consistent results.

04 ✅
Walk-Through & Sign-Off

Before we leave, we do a full walk-through with you. Any touch-ups needed get done on the spot. We don’t consider the job done until you’re satisfied.

What We Do

Our
Services

Every job starts with proper prep and ends with a finish you’re proud of. Five services. One crew. Zero shortcuts.

Interior & Exterior
Interior & Exterior Painting

Walls, ceilings, trim and doors inside. Siding, fascia, soffits and doors outside. We mask everything, prime properly, and apply two coats minimum — because the difference is in the prep.

Residential & Commercial→
Pressure Washing
Pressure Washing

Years of grime, mold, algae and buildup lifted off siding, driveways, decks and fences. We always pressure wash before any exterior paint job — because paint on a dirty surface won’t last.

Residential→
Staining
Staining

Decks, fences, pergolas and wood siding. We strip old finishes down to bare wood, sand smooth, then apply a premium penetrating stain that protects against moisture and UV — not just sits on top.

Exterior→
Caulking
Caulking

Gaps around windows, doors, trim and baseboards are sealed before a single drop of paint goes on. Skipping this step is why paint peels — we don’t skip it.

Prep Work→
Drywall
Drywall Repair, Mudding & Taping

Holes punched through walls, stress cracks, water stains, or full patch jobs after a renovation. We mud, tape and skim-coat until the surface is so smooth you won’t know anything was there.

Interior→

Our Story

Built on
Trust

Two decades of showing up, doing the work right, and earning referrals one job at a time.

Who We Are

Built on quality

Founded in 2016, Dan Butler Painting Inc. has built a reputation serving homeowners and businesses across Belleville and the GTA — known for exceptional prep work, clean job sites, and results that stand up over time.

We believe the best advertising is a job done so well, your neighbours ask who painted your house.

🎯
Precision FirstPrep work, clean lines, proper technique — every time.
🤝
Honest PricingNo surprises. Detailed quotes, transparent billing.
⏰
ReliableWe show up on time and finish on schedule.
🌿
Clean & TidyYour home is treated with the same care as our own.

The Team

The people behind the brush

Dan Butler
Founder & Lead Painter

Over 20 years experience in the trade. Dan oversees every project personally — interior, exterior, and everything in between.

Mike Rourke
Senior Painter

12 years with Dan Butler Painting. Mike specializes in exterior projects and intricate trim work.

Sarah Liu
Colour Consultant

Interior design background with a passion for transforming spaces. Sarah helps clients find the perfect palette every time.

What Clients Say

Real Results,
Real Reviews

Don't take our word for it — hear from the homeowners and businesses who trusted us with their spaces.

5.0
★★★★★

Average rating across 200+ verified reviews
Google • HomeStars • Word of Mouth

JM
James M.
Homeowner
★★★★★

“Dan and his crew painted the entire exterior of our house in 3 days. The prep work alone would have taken most companies a week. Absolutely flawless result — neighbours keep stopping to ask who we used.”

Exterior Painting
SB
Sandra B.
Homeowner
★★★★★

“I had my kitchen cabinets refinished and I genuinely can't believe it's the same kitchen. The finish is perfectly smooth — looks like new cabinetry. Saved me $12,000 over replacement. Incredible value.”

Cabinet Refinishing
TK
Tom K.
Property Manager
★★★★★

“We've used Dan Butler Painting for 6 commercial properties now. Consistent quality, never missed a deadline, and the sites are always spotless when they finish. The only contractor we trust.”

Commercial Painting
LN

Homeowner
★★★★★

“Sarah helped me choose colours I never would have picked myself — and they're perfect. The painting itself was meticulous. Clean, on time, no surprises on the invoice. 10/10 would recommend.”

★★★★★
